// McpUri: Public origin where this MCP server is reachable. Required in OAuth mode.

Mcp.// ApiKey: Used when AuthMode=ApiKey. Provide via env or user-secrets, never commit a real value.
Mcp.// OAuth: Used when AuthMode=OAuth. Issuer is the InvoiceXML web app where users authenticate.
Mcp.// FileInput: Limits for the validation tools' URL-fetch input mode. All optional; defaults shown.
